description: Dominican-inspired cocktail menu R&D website — interactive data viz + editorial storytelling

context.nextRnD: Negroni de Plátano Dorado — plantain infusion protocol

website.stack: Next.js 16 + TypeScript + Tailwind v4 + Framer Motion
website.status: Visual overhaul complete. Phases 1-6 done. Ready for deploy.
completedPhases: Phase 1: Scaffold + data layer (Next.js, fonts, typed data)
Phase 2: Layout + nav + hero (SiteHeader, HeroSection, PhilosophySection)
Phase 3: Menu section + drink modal (CategoryTabs, DrinkCard, DrinkModal, DrinkRadar)
Phase 6: Visual Overhaul — SVG drink illustrations, interactive DR map, dynamic layout, background density
website.fileCount: 35+ component files across data/, charts/, sections/, ui/, hooks/

recentDecisions: Programmatic SVG illustrations (soft flat style, no feGaussianBlur — performance)
DrinkVisual data type drives per-drink rendering (glass, liquid, ice, foam, smoke)
Interactive DR map with keyboard accessibility, mobile card fallback
Static grain texture PNG tile overlay at 3% opacity (not live feTurbulence)
Scroll-based background color shift via single page-level scroll listener
Botanical decorative SVGs desktop-only, parallax via consolidated scroll
